items.title: Prerequisite: ordinary derivatives
items.description: Partial derivatives are ordinary derivatives taken one coordinate at a time; limit definition, tangent slope and derivative rules all carry over.

items.title: Gradients
items.description: The gradient stacks all partial derivatives into one vector that points in the direction of steepest ascent—central to training.

items.title: Chain rule
items.description: Composed multivariable functions require the chain rule to compute partials through intermediate variables—the core of backpropagation.

items.title: Gradient descent
items.description: Optimization updates each parameter using the corresponding partial derivative of the loss, scaled by a learning rate.
